subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned towards the Kingdom and hath hearkened unto the call of the Lord of Might from this station which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن اقبل الی الملکوت و سمع ندآء مالک الجبروت فی هذا المقام الذی
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @wisdom [hikmat], @purpose; goal of creation, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
